description: A security vulnerability has been detected in SourceCodester Hotel and Lodge Management System up to 1.0. The impacted element is an unknown function of the file /manage_website.php. The manipulation of the argument website_image/back_login_image leads to unrestricted upload. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used.
